steps.title: Find the total composition
steps.content:
The $142$ kilograms of muscle is $67.0\%$ of the total composition. So the total composition is approximately
$$\frac{142}{0.670}=211.94$$

steps.title: Find the remaining composition
steps.content:
The remaining composition is $33.0\%$ of the total, which is approximately
$$211.94(0.330)=69.94$$

steps.title: Compute the bone mass
steps.content:
Bone is $43.6\%$ of the remaining composition, so the bone mass is approximately
$$69.94(0.436)=30.49$$
Rounded to the nearest tenth, this is $30.5$. The answer is 30.5.
